_comment: Curated offline multi-year timeline for retro cutoffs. Fictional entities; inspired by public long-duration storage themes. NOT scraped USPTO/news. NOT investment advice.

sources.title: Early notes on reversible iron oxidation for multi-day storage
sources.excerpt: Laboratory review of reversible iron oxidation pathways and porous electrode limits for multi-day grid storage concepts.

sources.title: Could rust batteries change everything?
sources.excerpt: Opinion piece wonders if rust batteries and reversible iron oxidation could one day power cities; no hiring, capex, or contracts cited.

sources.title: Porous iron electrode for multi-day iron-air storage
sources.excerpt: A porous iron electrode enables reversible iron oxidation for hundred-hour depth-discharge grid-dispatch storage with alkaline electrolyte.

sources.title: Oxygen electrode stack for long-duration iron-air cells
sources.excerpt: Oxygen-electrode architecture for long-duration multi-day iron-air cells with reversible oxidation and grid-dispatch duty cycles.

sources.title: Alkaline electrolyte formulation for iron-air depth discharge
sources.excerpt: Electrolyte additives improve reversible iron oxidation stability over hundred-hour discharge for grid-dispatch modules.

sources.title: LongHaul Energy pilots hundred-hour iron-air with utilities
sources.excerpt: LongHaul Energy is piloting hundred-hour depth-discharge iron-air modules for regional utility grid firming using reversible iron oxidation.

sources.title: Draft note: multi-day storage interconnection test profile
sources.excerpt: Working group draft defines interconnection test profiles for multi-day long-duration storage including iron-air dispatchable firming.

sources.title: FerroGrid signs iron powder supply with PureChitin Bio
